basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Exact match. Dr Inventory $100 / Cr Cash $100. Account names semantically equivalent (Inventory = Inventories).

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Exact match. Dr Inventory $300 / Cr Accounts Payable $300. Account names semantically equivalent (Accounts Payable = Trade payables).

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $180 / Cr Common Stock $100 / Cr Additional Paid-In Capital $80. Account names semantically equivalent.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $500 / Dr COGS $300 / Cr Sales Revenue $500 / Cr Inventory $300. All accounts and amounts match.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Exact match. Dr Accounts Payable $50 / Cr Cash $50. Accounts Payable = Trade payables.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Exact match. Dr Loan Payable - Old $100 / Cr Loan Payable - New $100. Semantically equivalent to Dr Notes payable $100 / Cr Notes payable $100 (old vs new).

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Exact match. Dr Loan Payable $200 / Cr Common Shares $200. Loan Payable = Notes payable; Common Shares = Share capital-Common.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Exact match. Dr Customer Deposits $100 / Cr Service Revenue $100. Customer Deposits = Contract liabilities; Service Revenue = Revenue.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Exact match. Dr Treasury Stock $200 / Cr Cash $200. Treasury Stock = Treasury shares.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Exact match. Dr Retained Earnings $500,000 / Cr Dividends Payable $500,000.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Exact match. Dr Preferred Shares $100 / Cr Common Shares $100. Preferred Shares = Share capital-Preferred; Common Shares = Share capital-Common.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Exact match. Dr Salaries Expense $100 / Cr Cash $100.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Exact match. Dr Utilities Expense $50 / Cr Accounts Payable $50. Accounts Payable is semantically equivalent to Accrued liabilities for accrual entries.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Exact match. Dr Loss on Inventory Destruction $2,000 / Cr Inventory $2,000. Loss on Inventory Destruction = Casualty loss.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Correctly produced no journal entry (empty lines array, decision APPROVED). Matches expected null entry.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Exact match. Dr Machinery $800,000 / Cr Accounts Payable $700,000 / Cr Cash $100,000. Machinery = PP&E Machinery; Accounts Payable = Trade payables.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Exact match. Dr Machinery $200,000 / Cr Cash $200,000. Machinery = PP&E Machinery.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Match with minor PV rounding. Actual: Dr Cash $2,657,536 / Dr Discount $342,464 vs Expected: Dr Cash $2,657,510 / Dr Discount $342,490. Difference of $26 is within acceptable rounding for PV calculations. Cr Bonds Payable $3,000,000 exact.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Exact match. Dr Warranty Expense $900,000 / Cr Warranty Provision $900,000. Warranty Provision = Provision for warranties.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Structure mismatch. Expected single Dr PP&E Marine structures $5,950,000 but actual splits into Dr Marine Structure $4,000,000 + Dr Asset Retirement Obligation - Capitalized $1,950,000. While the total debit equals $5,950,000, the expected entry consolidates into one PP&E line. Credits match: Cr AP $4,000,000 / Cr Provision $1,950,000. Both approaches are acceptable under IFRS (component accounting), but the line structure differs from expected.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Exact match. Dr Common Shares $50,000 / Dr Retained Earnings $10,000 / Cr Cash $60,000. Common Shares = Share capital.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Exact match. Dr Inventory $1,150,000 / Dr Warehouse Storage Expense $20,000 / Dr Freight Out Expense $50,000 / Cr Accounts Payable $1,000,000 / Cr Cash $220,000. Account names semantically equivalent (Warehouse Storage = Warehousing; Freight Out = Distribution costs).

int_10_prepayment.reason: Exact match. Dr Prepaid Expenses $1,000,000 / Cr Cash $1,000,000. Prepaid Expenses = Prepayments.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Structure mismatch. Expected 3-line entry: Dr Land $49,173,000 / Dr Discount on long-term payables $10,827,000 / Cr Long-term payables $60,000,000. Actual is 2-line entry at PV only: Dr Land $49,173,240 / Cr Long-term Payable $49,173,240. Missing the discount account and face-value presentation of the liability.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Exact match. Dr Land Improvements $1,750,000 / Dr Land $2,360,000 / Cr Cash $1,750,000 / Cr Cash $2,360,000. Land Improvements = PP&E Site improvements. Cash is semantically equivalent to Cash-chequing for the second credit line.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Exact match. Dr Charitable Donations Expense $1,000,000 / Cr Notes Payable $1,000,000. Charitable Donations Expense = Donations expense.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Exact match. Dr Vehicles $40,000 / Cr Cash $20,000 / Cr Notes Payable $20,000. Vehicles = PP&E Vehicles.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $200,000 / Cr Bank Loan Payable $200,000. Bank Loan Payable = Long-term borrowings.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $5,000 / Cr Unearned Revenue $5,000. Cash is semantically equivalent to Cash-chequing (general cash account encompasses chequing). Unearned Revenue = Contract liabilities.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Debit line disaggregation mismatch. Expected 2 debit lines: Dr PP&E Office equipment $5,500 / Dr PP&E Vehicles $250,000. Actual has 3 debit lines: Dr Office Equipment $2,000 / Dr Computer Equipment $3,500 / Dr Vehicles $250,000. The $5,500 is split into separate accounts. Credits match. The disaggregation is arguably more detailed but does not match expected.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $25,500 / Cr Moving Services Revenue $25,500. Moving Services Revenue = Revenue-Service revenue.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Exact match. Dr Accounts Receivable $31,500 / Cr Service Revenue $31,500. Accounts Receivable = Trade receivables; Service Revenue = Revenue-Service revenue.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: No entry produced (empty lines, decision INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION). Expected Dr R&D expense $50,000 / Cr Cash-chequing $50,000.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $45,900 / Dr Accounts Receivable $30,000 / Dr COGS $55,500 / Cr Sales Tax Payable $6,900 / Cr Sales Revenue $69,000 / Cr Inventory $55,500. All accounts and amounts match.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Exact match. Dr Manufacturing Overhead $15,000 / Dr Utilities Expense $5,500 / Cr Credit Card Payable $20,500. Manufacturing Overhead = WIP Manufacturing overhead.

int_24_advertising.reason: Tax line difference. Expected Dr Advertising expense $22,000 / Cr Cash $22,000. Actual: Dr Marketing Expense $19,469.03 / Dr HST Receivable $2,530.97 / Cr Cash $22,000. The actual splits out recoverable HST, reducing the expense. Marketing Expense = Advertising expense. Under tax-relaxed matching, this is correct with HST recovery.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Tax-related mismatch only. Expected Dr Building $3,000,000 + Dr VAT receivable $300,000 but actual Dr Building $3,300,000 (VAT absorbed into asset cost instead of separate receivable). The $300,000 difference is entirely VAT treatment. Credits match (Cr Cash-chequing $4,800,000 / Cr Other payables $4,500,000). Under tax-relaxed matching, treating VAT as non-recoverable (capitalized) vs recoverable (separate receivable) is an acceptable tax difference.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Credit line disaggregation mismatch. Expected 2 credit lines: Cr Statutory withholdings payable $7,750 / Cr Cash-chequing $37,250. Actual has 5 credit lines breaking statutory withholdings into: Cr Pension Payable $2,000 / Cr Health Insurance Payable $3,250 / Cr EI Payable $1,050 / Cr Income Tax Payable $1,450 / Cr Cash $37,250. Total withholdings = $7,750 matches, but line structure differs. Also Cash vs Cash-chequing. Debit side matches: Dr Manufacturing Wages $25,000 / Dr Salaries Expense $20,000.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Debit line disaggregation mismatch. Expected Dr Statutory withholdings payable $7,750 / Dr Employee benefits expense $6,300. Actual breaks withholdings into 4 lines: Dr Pension Payable $4,000 / Dr Health Insurance Payable $6,500 / Dr EI Payable $2,100 / Dr Income Tax Payable $1,450 (total $14,050). The actual merges employer-match costs into the withholding accounts rather than separating Employee benefits expense. Total debits equal $14,050 = Cr Cash $14,050, amounts balance but structure and classification differ.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Exact match. Dr Promotional Expense $7,000 / Cr Cash $7,000. Promotional Expense = Advertising expense (both are marketing/advertising costs).

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Exact match. Dr Cash $25,000 / Cr Security Deposits Payable $25,000. Security Deposits Payable = Rental deposits received.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Exact match. Dr Loans Receivable $2,000,000 / Cr Chequing Account $2,000,000. Loans Receivable = Short-term loans receivable; Chequing Account = Cash-chequing.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Exact match. Dr Vehicles $52,800 / Cr Accounts Payable $52,800. Vehicles = PP&E Vehicles; Accounts Payable = Other payables.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Match with minor PV rounding. Actual: Dr Cash $98,356.16 / Dr Loss $1,643.84 vs Expected: Dr Cash $98,356 / Dr Loss $1,644. Rounding within tolerance. Cr Notes Receivable $100,000 = Cr Trade receivables $100,000.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Match with minor PV rounding. Actual: Dr Cash $98,356.16 / Dr Interest Expense $1,643.84 vs Expected: Dr Cash $98,356 / Dr Interest expense $1,644. Rounding within tolerance. Cr Notes Payable - Bank $100,000 = Cr Short-term borrowings $100,000.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Exact match. Dr Financial Assets at FVTPL $3,000,000 / Dr Transaction Fees Expense $100,000 / Cr Cash $3,100,000. Transaction Fees Expense = Investment transaction costs.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Exact match. Dr Investment in Equity Securities - FVOCI $3,100,000 / Cr Cash $3,100,000. Investment in Equity Securities - FVOCI = Financial assets at FVOCI.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Exact match. Dr Investment in Associate $3,100,000 / Cr Cash $3,100,000.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Exact match. Dr Employee Benefits Expense $125 / Cr Credit Card Payable $125.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Account name mismatch. Expected Dr Meeting expense $125 but actual Dr Meals and Entertainment Expense $125. While both are valid expense accounts, 'Meals and Entertainment' is a broader category than the expected specific 'Meeting expense' account.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Account name mismatch. Expected Dr Entertainment expense $125 but actual Dr Meals and Entertainment Expense $125. 'Meals and Entertainment' is a broader combined account vs the expected specific 'Entertainment expense'.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Exact match. Dr Manufacturing Overhead $125 / Cr Credit Card Payable $125. Manufacturing Overhead = WIP Manufacturing overhead.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Tax line difference. Expected Dr Entertainment expense $1,320 / Cr Credit card payable $1,320. Actual: Dr Entertainment Expense $1,200 / Dr Sales Tax Receivable $120 / Cr Credit Card Payable $1,320. The actual breaks out recoverable sales tax, reducing the expense to pre-tax amount. Under tax-relaxed matching this is a valid treatment.

Actual: Dr Office Supplies Expense $1,200 / Dr Sales Tax Receivable $120 / Cr Credit Card Payable $1,320. Account classification differs (Office Supplies vs Employee benefits). Even under tax-relaxed matching, the expense account name does not match.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Exact match. Dr Prepaid Rent $24,000 / Cr Cash $24,000. Cash is semantically equivalent to Cash-chequing (general cash account encompasses chequing).

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Exact match. Dr Rent Expense $24,000 / Cr Cash $24,000. Cash is semantically equivalent to Cash-chequing (general cash account encompasses chequing).
